personalInfo.summary: Full-stack developer with 5+ years building web applications using React, TypeScript, and Node.js. Experienced in API design, performance optimization, and cross-functional collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Led development of a customer portal using Next.js and TypeScript, serving 12,000+ monthly active users.
Designed and implemented REST APIs with Node.js and PostgreSQL, reducing average response time by 35%.
Collaborated with product and design teams to ship features on two-week sprint cycles.
Mentored two junior developers through code reviews and pair programming sessions.

experience.title: Full-Stack Developer
bullets: Built and maintained React applications with reusable component libraries.
Integrated third-party APIs and payment gateways for e-commerce clients.
Wrote unit and integration tests with Jest, improving test coverage to 80%.
Participated in on-call rotation and incident response for production systems.
